reviews.comment:
Sobre el río me atendió un playero que siempre de mala cara, actitud poco amable, parece peleado con los dueños/ACA… mala predisposición y trato.

(Translated by Google)
On the river, I was served by a beach attendant who always had a bad attitude, an unfriendly demeanor, and seemed to be at odds with the owners/ACA… poor disposition and treatment.
